Gate 1 to Gate 2.path: Head west along the outer concourse loop. Gate 2 is just past the team store on your right.

Gate 2 to Gate 1.path: Head east along the outer concourse loop. Gate 1 is just past the plaza gate entrance.

Gate 1 to Gate 3.path: Walk east on the main outer path. Gate 3 is located next to the main rail transit entrance.

Gate 3 to Gate 1.path: Walk west on the main outer path. Gate 1 is located next to the north entrance plaza.

Gate 1 to Gate 4.path: Take the west outer pathway past Gate 2, continue south. Gate 4 is situated on the southwest side of the plaza.

Gate 4 to Gate 1.path: Walk north past Gate 2, continue east along the outer path to Gate 1 on the north side.

Gate 1 to Gate 5.path: Take the east outer pathway past Gate 3, continue south. Gate 5 is on the southeast plaza entrance.

Gate 5 to Gate 1.path: Walk north past Gate 3, continue west along the outer loop to Gate 1 on the north side.

Gate 2 to Gate 3.path: Walk north towards Gate 1, then follow the outer concourse east. Gate 3 is on the opposite side near the transit station.

Gate 3 to Gate 2.path: Walk north towards Gate 1, then follow the outer concourse west. Gate 2 is past the north plaza.

Gate 2 to Gate 4.path: Walk south along the west plaza walkway. Gate 4 is located straight ahead near parking Lot E.

Gate 4 to Gate 2.path: Walk north along the west plaza walkway. Gate 2 is located straight ahead past the west ticket windows.

Gate 2 to Gate 5.path: Walk north past Gate 1, then east past Gate 3, and follow the loop south. Gate 5 is on the southeast side.

Gate 5 to Gate 2.path: Walk north past Gate 3, then west past Gate 1, and follow the loop south. Gate 2 is on the southwest side.

Gate 3 to Gate 4.path: Walk south past Gate 5, then turn west across the south plaza. Gate 4 is on the southwest corner.

Gate 4 to Gate 3.path: Walk east across the south plaza to Gate 5, then turn north. Gate 3 is on the northeast side.

Gate 3 to Gate 5.path: Walk south along the east plaza path. Gate 5 is on your left near parking Lot F.

Gate 5 to Gate 3.path: Walk north along the east plaza path. Gate 3 is on your right near the train tracks.

Gate 4 to Gate 5.path: Walk straight east across the south plaza walkway. Gate 5 is directly opposite Gate 4.

Gate 5 to Gate 4.path: Walk straight west across the south plaza walkway. Gate 4 is directly opposite Gate 5.
